close_reason: Implemented cargo-prune-workspace in Go with prunedCargoSource Nix helper. Updated rustdeps-gen, pydeps-gen, and nix-prefetch-cached to use the new helper.
description:
In nix/packages/rustdeps-gen.nix and nix/packages/pydeps-gen.nix, we currently include Cargo.toml files from unrelated workspace members just to satisfy Cargo workspace resolution:

```nix
fileset = fs.unions [
  (root + "/Cargo.toml")
  (root + "/Cargo.lock")
  (root + "/cmd/rustdeps-gen")
  # Include other workspace members for Cargo workspace resolution (just Cargo.toml)
  (root + "/cmd/pydeps-gen/Cargo.toml")
  (root + "/examples/rust-hello/Cargo.toml")
  ...
];
```

This is fragile - adding a new workspace member requires updating all package definitions.

## Implementation Plan

### 1. Rust CLI: cargo-prune-workspace (cmd/cargo-prune-workspace)

A Rust tool that modifies Cargo.toml to keep only whitelisted workspace members:

```bash
cargo-prune-workspace --members cmd/rustdeps-gen,cmd/nix-prefetch-cached,rust/prefetch-cache
```

- Reads Cargo.toml from current directory (or --manifest-path)
- Parses [workspace] members list
- Removes entries not in the whitelist
- Writes modified Cargo.toml in place (or to --output)
- Use toml_edit crate to preserve formatting/comments

### 2. Nix wrapper: prunedCargoSource (nix/lib/cargo.nix)

Higher-level function that wraps fs.toSource and applies cargo-prune-workspace:

```nix
prunedCargoSource {
  root = ./.;
  members = [ "cmd/rustdeps-gen" "rust/prefetch-cache" ];
  extraFiles = [ ./Cargo.lock ];  # additional files to include
}
```

This would:
1. Use fs.toSource to create initial source
2. Run cargo-prune-workspace as a derivation to patch Cargo.toml
3. Return the pruned source

### Result

Package definitions become simpler:
```nix
src = prunedCargoSource {
  root = ../..;
  members = [ "cmd/rustdeps-gen" "cmd/nix-prefetch-cached" "rust/prefetch-cache" ];
};
```

No need to manually track Cargo.toml files from other workspace members.

**Files to create:**
- cmd/cargo-prune-workspace/Cargo.toml
- cmd/cargo-prune-workspace/src/main.rs
- nix/packages/cargo-prune-workspace.nix
- nix/lib/cargo.nix
title: cargo-prune-workspace: helper to patch Cargo.toml workspace members for filtered builds
